stance: Says laws must be enforced; criminal illegal immigrants, not just violent offenders, should be prioritized for deportation, and those found illegally during enforcement should be removed.
quote: Criminal illegal immigrants not just those convicted of violent crimes should be prioritized for deportation.

stance: Opposes federal control of education, arguing local teachers, administrators, parents and community leaders know best.
quote: I do not believe that unelected federal bureaucrats are a better judge of educational practices than our local teachers, school administrators, parents and community leaders

stance: Makes public land her signature issue; wants to return strategic land control to the state and use it to address the housing shortage.
quote: Jenn Billat will fight in Congress to: protect Nevada land and hunting heritage, return strategic land control to the state, solve the housing shortage

stance: Supports developing Nevada's own energy resources, faster permitting, and creating jobs at home.
quote: We need policies that allow us to harness our own resources, develop new sources of energy, improve our permitting processes, and create jobs here at home.

stance: Backs using DOGE and AI systems to identify fraud and waste in government spending.
quote: Policies to identify potential fraud and waste in government spending via DOGE and AI systems should be implemented.

stance: On public lands, would convene stakeholders to communicate better and set clearer objectives across conservation, hunting and tribal lands.
quote: I would bring them in and we would communicate better...clearer objectives...work with everyone...conserving, hunting, tribal lands.

stance: Names affordability the top issue but says government has limited power over prices, blaming corporate leaders more than Trump policy.
quote: Help Nevadans with affordability crisis.

stance: Calls for enacting comprehensive immigration laws.
quote: Enact comprehensive immigration laws.

stance: Would bar congressional pay raises until the federal budget is balanced.
quote: No congressional pay raises without a balanced budget.

stance: Would allow only single-subject 'clean' bills with no amendments.
quote: Single subject clean bills only! No amendments.

stance: Names the national debt his top issue, saying it is approaching $39 trillion and is not being seriously discussed in Washington.
quote: We're approaching $39 trillion in debt. And every second I'm talking to you and your audience, is another $50,000 to $60,000 tagged onto that debt.

stance: Says rural healthcare and housing differ from urban areas; cites finding land to build on and interest rates as the common barrier to homeownership.
quote: The health care issues and the housing issues are a little different out in the rural counties...it's finding the land to build on. So those are very different challenges, but there's always one common denominator. And that is our interest rates for people to get into the homes.

stance: Pledges to uphold the Constitution and demand real transparency, holding government to the honesty and accountability standards expected of those in uniform.
quote: Uphold the Constitution as the governing doctrine of our office. Restore liberties and demand real transparency from government.

stance: Prioritizes national defense, vowing to protect Nevada's military bases and warfighters and keep the state central to national security.
quote: Protect our military bases, support our warfighters, and ensure Nevada remains essential to our national security infrastructure.

stance: Top issue is reining in the 'administrative state' of unelected agencies he says create regulations without accountability or due process.
quote: control of what we refer to now as the administrative state, where we have agencies over agencies creating regulations and they're elected by no one

stance: Flags high food prices as a concern but acknowledges he does not yet have a solution.
quote: Why are the food prices so high? I don't know the answer yet

stance: Credits ICE with securing the border and enforcing the law, but wants more transparent investigations.
quote: I think ICE has done a lot right. They have helped secure our borders, enforced our laws.

stance: Says public land should be managed with local input and collaboration among all parties.
quote: Public land should be managed by local input...Everybody needs to come together and figure out together.

stance: Says ICE has done well targeting the worst criminals but lacks the personnel and training for crowd control.
quote: To my knowledge, they're going after the criminal element, the worst of the worst...they've done good with that.

stance: Wants public land kept accessible to the public and would press managers on access guarantees.
quote: I want the public land to be accessible to the public...I'm going to ask questions like: What are you going to do to allow people to have access?

stance: Says ICE sent a message to criminal undocumented immigrants but should work more closely with local communities rather than acting alone.
quote: Work more closely with local communities...There should never be an agency that just does things on its own.

stance: On public lands, favors forming coalitions and prioritizing civility so people feel heard.
quote: Form coalitions...recognize that this problem is not unique...prioritize civility so people feel heard.

stance: Says ICE has done nothing right and should be abolished, calling it wasteful and dangerous.
quote: Literally nothing. It is wasteful, duplicitous, ineffective and dangerous.

stance: Criticizes public-lands policy for not improving Nevadans' lives and questions resource extraction for foreign nations.
quote: The focus hasn't been on making Nevadans' lives better...Are you trying to help foreign nations extract resources?

stance: Says ICE got most of the right people but the federal government must communicate and listen better to local communities.
quote: Communication. The federal government needed to be better listeners to local communities.

stance: On public lands, would meet with each stakeholder and assess what use is reasonable.
quote: You've got to sit down and communicate...have meetings with each stakeholder...look at lands and see what's reasonable.

stance: Would repeal tax cuts for billionaires and corporations and shift relief toward ordinary people.
quote: I would get rid of the tax cuts that were made for the billionaires and the corporations

stance: Highlights housing affordability, noting many people cannot own a home into their 30s or 40s.
quote: Most people can't own a whole clear into their 30s or 40s now

stance: Wants to reinvigorate congressional oversight and raised concerns about AI as a national-security threat.
quote: Reinvigorating congressional oversight

stance: Frames healthcare as a fight he has waged since 2017 defending the Affordable Care Act from cuts.
quote: This is the fight that I've been in since 2017 when the Affordable Care Act was under threat of being cut

stance: Supports returning federal land to tribal nations.
Supports raising the federal minimum wage.
quote: Raising the federal minimum wage

stance: Opposes mass deportations, citing labor impacts on construction and agriculture.
Would make large companies like Tesla, Amazon and the mining industry pay their fair share.
quote: Tesla, Amazon, the mining industry finally pay their fair share

stance: Backs universal child care and parental leave alongside cradle-to-grave 'baby bonds.'
quote: universal cradle to grave baby bonds, universal child care, universal parental leave and...universal basic income
